'''faruhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneometer|pneometer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-r-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneometer|pneometer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| faruhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:færihith|færihith]] || [[word:færihij|færihij]] || [[word:færihish|færihish]] || [[word:færihi|færihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:faruruhuth|faruruhuth]] || [[word:faruruhuj|faruruhuj]] || [[word:faruruhush|faruruhush]] || [[word:faruruhu|faruruhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:faruhuth|faruhuth]] || [[word:faruhuj|faruhuj]] || [[word:faruhush|faruhush]] || [[word:faruhu|faruhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:farufhuth|farufhuth]] || [[word:farufhuj|farufhuj]] || [[word:farufhush|farufhush]] || [[word:farufhuf|farufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:faruhuthu|faruhuthu]] || [[word:faruhuju|faruhuju]] || [[word:faruhushu|faruhushu]] || [[word:faruhuku|faruhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:faruhuth|faruhuth]] || [[word:faruhuj|faruhuj]] || [[word:faruhush|faruhush]] || [[word:faruhu|faruhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:faruhuthul|faruhuthul]] || [[word:faruhujul|faruhujul]] || [[word:faruhushul|faruhushul]] || [[word:faruhukul|faruhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:faruhuthuthu|faruhuthuthu]] || [[word:faruhujuju|faruhujuju]] || [[word:faruhushushu|faruhushushu]] || [[word:faruhuku|faruhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:faruhuthun|faruhuthun]] || [[word:faruhujun|faruhujun]] || [[word:faruhushun|faruhushun]] || [[word:faruhukun|faruhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:faruhuthuoro|faruhuthuoro]] || [[word:faruhujuoro|faruhujuoro]] || [[word:faruhushuoro|faruhushuoro]] || [[word:faruhukuoro|faruhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
